project_metadata.name: TratorShop
project_metadata.description: Premium Agricultural Marketplace for Mato Grosso do Sul

design_philosophy.core_principle: Fusion over Imitation: Combine the reliability of John Deere aesthetics with the fluidity of modern fintech apps.
unconventional_decisions: No generic 'Bootstrap' grids - use Bento layouts for categories
No 'default green' - use deep Forest Green and vivid Harvest Gold

primary.name: Forest Deep
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Header, Active States, Brand Identity

secondary.name: Harvest Gold
secondary.usage: Call to Actions (CTA), Highlights, Badges, 'New' tags

headings.name: Outfit
headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, Section Titles, Price Tags

rules: Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px
Price text should be prominent and use the Heading font

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

bento_grid.wrapper: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A4D2E] hover:bg-[#143d24] text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F9C02D] hover:bg-[#f5b00b] text-[#1A4D2E] font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1A4D2E] text-[#1A4D2E] hover:bg-[#1A4D2E]/5 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-md
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#1ebd59] text-white font-bold flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 rounded-md shadow-md

cards.listing: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-green-600/50 transition-all duration-300 group
cards.category: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl aspect-[4/3] group cursor-pointer

inputs.search: h-12 pl-12 pr-4 rounded-full border-slate-200 focus:border-green-600 focus:ring-green-600/20 shadow-sm

media.image_style: object-cover w-full h-full transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-105

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on green buttons is pure white (#FFFFFF). Text on yellow buttons must be dark green (#1A4D2E).
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring with offset (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-green-600).

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for main backgrounds. Use clean whites and subtle grays to let the product images pop.
Use 'Outfit' font for all Price tags and Headings.
Ensure the 'WhatsApp' button is always distinct and prominent on Listing pages.
Mobile First: The search bar must be the most prominent element on mobile homepage.
Do not center text in cards. Left align for better readability.
Use Skeleton loaders for images while they fetch.
All forms (Add Listing) must use Shadcn Form components with Zod validation.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use 'sonner' for notifications.
instructions_to_main_agent.maps: Use 'react-leaflet' and 'leaflet' for maps. Add proper CSS for leaflet maps.
instructions_to_main_agent.seo: Add meta tags for 'TratorShop - Buy & Sell Tractors in MS'.
